content: react-i18next for small apps: use bundled resources (no HTTP backend) with i18next-resources-to-backend or direct import. Structure: src/locales/{en,pl}/translation.json (single namespace for small apps) or namespaced: common.json, onboarding.json, report.json. Initialize i18n once in src/i18n.ts and import before React renders. useTranslation('namespace') hook in components. For two languages with limited translation volume, bundle both locale files in the initial chunk — lazy loading adds complexity without meaningful size savings at this scale.
